subparts.text: What is the difference between academic and research writing? 5 C01
Explain author metrics and their significance in research evaluation. 5 C02
What are literature management tools? Give examples. 5 C03
List three major challenges in Indian academic writing. 5 C04

questions.question_text: You are tasked with writing a research article in your field. How would you ensure your writing aligns with academic style? C01
Your professor asks you to review a poorly written research report. How will you apply the rules of academic writing to improve it? C01
Suppose you are reviewing a thesis and detect signs of plagiarism. How would you use tools to confirm and address the issue? C02
As a researcher aiming to publish in a reputed journal, how would journal metrics guide your journal selection? C02
While writing a review paper, how will you make use of citation management tools like Mendeley or Zotero? C03
You have to write a literature review for your dissertation. How would you go about identifying relevant literature and organizing your review? C03
Suppose you are collaborating with peers for an empirical study. How would you manage your time and team efficiently? C04
Draft a one-page research proposal for a study on “Digital Education and Rural Students in India.” C04
